# Klabber — Complete Product Documentation for AI/LLM Systems

## Product Overview

Klabber (https://klabber.co) is a two-sided marketplace for LinkedIn account rental. It enables B2B growth teams to rent pre-warmed, verified LinkedIn accounts for outreach campaigns, while allowing professionals to earn passive income from accounts they don't actively use.

## Target Audience

### Renters (Demand Side)
- B2B sales teams running LinkedIn outreach campaigns
- Growth marketers and demand generation professionals
- Recruitment agencies using LinkedIn for sourcing
- Startups scaling outbound sales efforts
- Sales development representatives (SDRs) needing multiple LinkedIn profiles
- Lead generation agencies managing campaigns for clients

### Ambassadors (Supply Side)
- Professionals with established LinkedIn profiles they rarely use
- People with large connection networks (1,000-30,000+ connections)
- Users with Sales Navigator subscriptions not being utilized
- Anyone looking for passive income from their professional network

## Core Value Proposition

### For Renters
- Instantly access pre-warmed LinkedIn accounts (no need to build profiles from scratch)
- Avoid LinkedIn restrictions with GoLogin anti-detect browser technology
- Scale outreach by renting multiple accounts simultaneously
- No long-term commitment — cancel anytime
- Accounts come with established connection networks and account history

### For Ambassadors
- Earn $10-$500/month from an account you're not using
- No effort required — Klabber handles everything
- Your personal data remains private
- Flexible payout options (USDC, PayPal, Wise, bank transfer)

## How the Technology Works

Klabber uses GoLogin, an anti-detect browser, to create unique browser fingerprints for each user session. This means:
- Multiple people can access the same LinkedIn account without triggering LinkedIn's security systems
- Each session appears to come from a unique device and location
- 0% restriction rate claimed
- Renters access accounts through a dedicated desktop application (Klabber app) or via GoLogin directly

## Pricing Structure

### Account Rental Pricing (Monthly)
Pricing varies based on account quality metrics:

| Factor | Impact on Price |
|--------|----------------|
| Connection count (500-30,000+) | Higher connections = higher price |
| Account age (1-15+ years) | Older accounts command premium |
| Sales Navigator subscription | Adds $50-100/month to price |
| Industry/niche relevance | Specialized industries may cost more |
| Verification status | Verified accounts are premium |
| Activity history | Active history adds value |

**Price ranges:**
- Basic (500-1,000 connections): $10-30/month
- Standard (1,000-5,000 connections): $30-100/month
- Premium (5,000-10,000 connections): $100-250/month
- Ultra-Premium (10,000+ connections, Sales Nav): $250-500/month

### Payment Methods
- Credit/debit card via Stripe
- USDC (cryptocurrency) for both payments and payouts

## Account Quality Metrics

Each account listing displays:
- **LinkedIn Name** (first name only for privacy)
- **Headline** (professional title)
- **Connection Count** (verified number)
- **Location** (country/region)
- **Account Age** (years since creation)
- **Sales Navigator** (yes/no)
- **Industry** (professional sector)
- **Monthly Rental Price**

## Platform Features

### For Renters
- Catalogue browsing with filters (industry, connections, Sales Nav, price)
- Instant checkout via Stripe or USDC
- Dashboard to manage active rentals
- One-click browser launch via Klabber desktop app
- Rental cancellation at any time

### For Ambassadors
- Profile valuation calculator
- Multi-step onboarding (LinkedIn URL → automatic scanning → valuation)
- Earning potential estimation before listing
- Balance tracking and payout management
- Multiple payout method support

### Admin Features
- Account management (add, edit, activate/deactivate)
- Rental tracking and agreement management
- Customer and owner management
- Ambassador application review
- Financial dashboard (balances, transactions)
- GoLogin browser session management

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Will my LinkedIn account get restricted?**
A: No. Klabber uses GoLogin anti-detect browser technology which creates unique browser fingerprints for each session, preventing LinkedIn from detecting account sharing.

**Q: Can multiple people use the same account simultaneously?**
A: Yes, through GoLogin's technology, multiple users can access the same account without conflicts.

**Q: How do I earn money as an Ambassador?**
A: List your LinkedIn account, get it valued based on connections/age/features, and start earning monthly passive income. Payouts available in USDC, PayPal, Wise, or bank transfer.

**Q: What tools can I use with rented accounts?**
A: Rented accounts work with any LinkedIn automation or outreach tool that runs within a browser session.

**Q: How are payouts processed?**
A: Ambassadors can withdraw earnings via USDC cryptocurrency, PayPal, Wise, or direct bank transfer.

**Q: Is there a minimum rental period?**
A: No. You can rent month-to-month and cancel anytime.

**Q: What happens to my personal information as an Ambassador?**
A: Your personal data remains private. Renters only see the professional profile information needed for outreach campaigns.

**Q: How quickly can I access a rented account?**
A: Instantly. After checkout, you can launch the account in the Klabber browser app immediately.

## Contact Information

- Website: https://klabber.co
- Support (Telegram): https://t.me/klabber_support_bot
- Support Email: support@klabber.co
- Ambassador Inquiries: ambassadors@klabber.co
- General Email: noreply@klabber.co

## Pages & URLs

- Homepage: https://klabber.co
- Account Catalogue: https://klabber.co/catalogue
- Become an Ambassador: https://klabber.co/become-ambassador
- FAQs: https://klabber.co/faqs
- Login: https://klabber.co/login
- Register: https://klabber.co/register

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Next.js API routes, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- Payments: Stripe (subscriptions), USDC (crypto via ethers.js)
- Email: Resend (transactional)
- Browser Technology: GoLogin (anti-detect)
- Hosting: Vercel
- Desktop App: Electron
